text: The Central Trading System shall complete the trading of stock.
The Central Trading System shall analyze instructions and divide them into several kinds.
The Central Trading System shall match instructions under specific prescripts.
The Central Trading System shall provide interfaces to send messages to other modules.
The Central Trading System shall receive instructions from the trade client serve.
The Central Trading System shall produce new messages to be sent to network message promulgating after processing instructions.
The Central Trading System shall permit the system manager to access information.
The Central Trading System shall save 'buy' instructions upon receipt from the Transaction User Interface.
The Central Trading System shall match instructions with the same stock ID for buy transactions.
The Central Trading System shall modify information of matched instructions after a trade is made.
The Central Trading System shall save 'sell' instructions upon receipt from the Transaction User Interface.
The Central Trading System shall match instructions with the same stock ID for sell transactions.
The Central Trading System shall save 'cancel' instructions upon receipt from the Transaction User Interface.
The Central Trading System shall cancel the correlative instruction upon receipt of a valid cancel instruction.
The Central Trading System shall provide successful trade information to Security Account Management.
The Central Trading System shall implement queries received from the Trading Information Release system.
The Central Trading System shall structuralize queried data for the Trading Information Release system.
The Central Trading System shall send queried data to the information release module.
The instruction pretreatment module shall judge the validity of instructions.
The instruction pretreatment module shall freeze the fund in the user account according to the trade instruction.
The instruction pretreatment module shall write log files for incoming instructions.
The query manager shall refer to the Database or the instructions list to process query instructions.
The trade manager shall make a match in the instructions list for trade instructions.
The buy instruction shall include five parameters: user ID, stock ID, quantity, respected price, and timestamp.
The sell instruction shall include five parameters: user ID, stock ID, quantity, respected price, and timestamp.
The user query instruction shall include three parameters: user ID, query content, and restrict parameters.
The stock query instruction shall include three parameters: stock ID, query content, and restrict parameters.
The Central Trading System shall match instructions based on the price first principle and the time first principle.
The Central Trading System shall reject a trading instruction if the price is higher than the rising limit or lower than the falling limit.
The Central Trading System shall return the result for any trading instructions received.
The Central Trading System shall remove instructions that have not finished trading within one day.
The maintainers of the Central Trading System must be familiar with Java programming and Sockets.
The Central Trading System must include strategies to overcome system crashes when overhead exceeds capacity.
